banner.title: JHS Enrollment
banner.subtitle: Welcome to our Junior High School. Start your journey from Grade 7 to 10 here.

options.title: Online JHS Forms
options.description: Choose the form that applies to your current status. High-speed digital enrollment for all JHS learners.
options.note: For Grade 7, please have your SF9 and PSA Birth Certificate ready.

options.title: Physical Forms
options.description: Prefer to fill out a paper form? Visit us at the school office for the official DepEd Enrollment Form. You can also download the forms below to print and fill out beforehand.

requirements.title: JHS Requirements
requirements.subtitle: Please prepare the following documents for Junior High School enrollment:

items.title: PSA Birth Certificate
items.description: Required for incoming Grade 7 and transferees.

items.title: SF9 (Report Card)
items.description: Latest grades from Elementary or previous JHS level.

items.title: SF10 (Permanent Record)
items.description: Required for incoming Grade 7 students and transferees.

items.title: Certificate of Completion
items.description: Optional requirement for incoming Grade 7 students.
